description: Upload a binary blob (e.g. an image) and receive a blob reference.

main.description: Accepts a raw binary body and stores it as a blob. The Content-Type header must be set to the MIME type of the uploaded data.

input.description: Raw binary content of the blob. Supported MIME types: image/jpeg, image/png, image/gif, image/webp.

errors.name: InvalidMimeType
errors.description: The Content-Type of the uploaded data is not an accepted image MIME type.

errors.name: BlobTooLarge
errors.description: The uploaded blob exceeds the maximum permitted size.
